/usr/bin/c++ -g -O0 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -fsanitize=address -fsanitize=address -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/SoemMotroControl.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/SoemMotroControl.dir/ExampleTask/task.c.o CMakeFiles/SoemMotroControl.dir/ExampleTask/funct_command.c.o CMakeFiles/SoemMotroControl.dir/ExampleTask/funct_control.c.o CMakeFiles/SoemMotroControl.dir/ExampleTask/simple_tp.c.o CMakeFiles/SoemMotroControl.dir/main/taskmain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SoemMotroControl.dir/hal/hal_lib.c.o CMakeFiles/SoemMotroControl.dir/rtapi/uspace_rtapi_app.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SoemMotroControl.dir/rtapi/uspace_common.c.o CMakeFiles/SoemMotroControl.dir/time/timer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SoemMotroControl.dir/time/_timer.cpp.o -o SoemMotroControl  -lpthread -lrt
